checks.title: Regression: BullMQ + Redis job queue system implemented
checks.notes: Verified at fix time - bullmq and ioredis packages installed, queues created for email-scan/unsubscribe/bulk-delete/rollup-digest, API routes updated to use queue.add() instead of direct function calls, docker-compose.yml includes Redis service, .env.example has REDIS_URL configuration

checks.title: Regression: Library modules source correctly in bash/zsh
checks.notes: Verified at fix time - V3 smoke check passes for all lib/*.sh modules in both bash and zsh. Used ${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-$0} for zsh compatibility, moved LAZYDAVE_DIR setup before source guard
